Class Pipeline

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.Pipeline
public final class Pipeline extends Object
Central compilation pipeline for the Registermaschine.

This class provides a configurable pipeline to transform source code into a compiled program via three stages: tokenisation, parsing, and compilation. Custom lexer, parser, and compiler implementations can be used globally.

The pipeline supports a global IInstructionSet or a per-invoke instruction set for compilation.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ

    Represents the parsing stage in the pipeline.
    static final record 
    Pipeline.TokenStage
    Represents the tokenisation stage in the pipeline.

    • setGlobalInstructionSet

      public static void setGlobalInstructionSet(dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet set)
      Sets the global IInstructionSet used by pipeline methods ending in `WithGlobal`.
      Parameters:

    • compileWithGlobal

      public static dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.ICompiledProgram compileWithGlobal(String sourceCode) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.SyntaxErrorException, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException
      Compiles source code using the global instruction set.
      Parameters:
      sourceCode - the source code to compile
      Returns:
      the compiled program
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.SyntaxErrorException - if a syntax error occurs during parsing
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException - if a pipeline stage cannot be instantiated

    • compile

      public static dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.ICompiledProgram compile(String sourceCode, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet set) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.SyntaxErrorException, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException
      Compiles source code using the provided instruction set.
      Parameters:
      sourceCode - the source code to compile
      set - the instruction set to use
      Returns:
      the compiled program
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.SyntaxErrorException - if a syntax error occurs during parsing
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException - if a pipeline stage cannot be instantiated

    • tokenizeWithGlobal

      public static Pipeline.TokenStage tokenizeWithGlobal(String sourceCode) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException
      Tokenises source code using the global instruction set.
      Parameters:
      sourceCode - the source code to tokenise
      Returns:
      a Pipeline.TokenStage representing the tokenisation stage
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException - if a pipeline stage cannot be instantiated

    • tokenize

      public static Pipeline.TokenStage tokenize(String sourceCode, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet instructionSet) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException
      Tokenises source code using a specific instruction set.
      Parameters:
      sourceCode - the source code to tokenise
      instructionSet - the instruction set to use
      Returns:
      a Pipeline.TokenStage representing the tokenisation stage
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException - if a pipeline stage cannot be instantiated
